name: InfoTracer

steps: Open the opt-out page at the search URL below.
Enter the first name, last name, state, and city on the listing you want removed.
If you live in a state with deletion rights, you can instead use the privacy form at https://members.infotracer.com/privacyform.
Covered persons (judges, prosecutors, law enforcement and immediate family under the Daniel Anderl Act) can email privacy@infotracer.com with the subject 'Attention Covered Person Removal Request'.

notes: General removal keys on a single name plus city/state, so removing a deadname listing doesn't by itself tie it to your current name. A state-rights privacy form and a covered-person email route also exist. Re-check periodically.
attribution: Derived from Big-Ass Data Broker Opt-Out List (CC BY-NC-SA).
